VALUES ('11a64899-007c-43fd-bd27-0f5f605d4399', 'In a mixture, the ratio of ingredient A to ingredient B is $8:9$. VALUES ('c887c76f-3de3-44da-9931-802ae9307c21', 'What is the mean of the data set?', 'Data set: 11, 13, 15, 17, 19', NULL, '[{"id":"A","text":"$15$","is_correct":true,"explanation":"Sum 75 ÷ 5 = 15."},{"id":"B","text":"$14$","is_correct":false,"explanation":"Arithmetic error."},{"id":"C","text":"$15$","is_correct":false,"explanation":"That is the median, not the mean."},{"id":"D","text":"$17$","is_correct":false,"explanation":"Too large."}]'::jsonb, 'A', 'Mean = (11+13+15+17+19)/5 = 15.', NULL, 'Problem-Solving and Data Analysis', 'One-variable data', 'math', 'psda', 'OIA', 'OIA', 'easy', true, 'SAT', 'multiple_choice', true, true, 'scholaris_ai', '{"generator":"scholaris_bulk_v1","original":true,"explanation_v2":true}'::jsonb, now(), now())

INSERT INTO public.questions
(id, question_text, stimulus_text, stimulus_type, options, correct_answer, explanation, hint, topic, subtopic, section, domain_id, skill_id, math_skill_code, difficulty, calculator_allowed, exam_type, question_type, is_platform_question, ai_generated, source, source_metadata, created_at, updated_at)
VALUES ('157b730b-463a-43bd-9fee-44cea2f33d8d', 'What is the slope of the line?', 'A line passes through points $(1, 3)$ and $(5, 11)$ in the $xy$-plane.', NULL, '[{"id":"A","text":"$1$","is_correct":false,"explanation":"Incorrect rise over run."},{"id":"B","text":"$2$","is_correct":true,"explanation":"Slope = $\\frac{11-3}{5-1} = 2$."},{"id":"C","text":"$3$","is_correct":false,"explanation":"Adds 1 to the slope."},{"id":"D","text":"$11$","is_correct":false,"explanation":"That is a $y$-coordinate, not slope."}]'::jsonb, 'B', 'Slope = $\frac{8}{4} = 2$.', NULL, 'Problem-Solving and Data Analysis', 'Two-variable data', 'math', 'psda', 'TVA', 'TVA', 'easy', true, 'SAT', 'multiple_choice', true, true, 'scholaris_ai', '{"generator":"scholaris_bulk_v1","original":true,"explanation_v2":true}'::jsonb, now(), now())
ON CONFLICT (id) DO NOTHING;

VALUES ('ad00f05a-3aa4-4e30-b80a-98a1a7a32d5e', 'What is the slope of the line?', 'A line passes through points $(2, 5)$ and $(6, 13)$ in the $xy$-plane.', NULL, '[{"id":"A","text":"$1$","is_correct":false,"explanation":"Incorrect rise over run."},{"id":"B","text":"$2$","is_correct":true,"explanation":"Slope = $\\frac{13-5}{6-2} = 2$."},{"id":"C","text":"$3$","is_correct":false,"explanation":"Adds 1 to the slope."},{"id":"D","text":"$13$","is_correct":false,"explanation":"That is a $y$-coordinate, not slope."}]'::jsonb, 'B', 'Slope = $\frac{8}{4} = 2$.', NULL, 'Problem-Solving and Data Analysis', 'Two-variable data', 'math', 'psda', 'TVA', 'TVA', 'medium', true, 'SAT', 'multiple_choice', true, true, 'scholaris_ai', '{"generator":"scholaris_bulk_v1","original":true,"explanation_v2":true}'::jsonb, now(), now())
ON CONFLICT (id) DO NOTHING;

VALUES ('4533a503-8603-4cf6-b808-728ad0d1df3b', 'What is the probability of choosing a red marble?', 'A bag contains 4 red marbles and 15 blue marbles. INSERT INTO public.questions
(id, question_text, stimulus_text, stimulus_type, options, correct_answer, explanation, hint, topic, subtopic, section, domain_id, skill_id, math_skill_code, difficulty, calculator_allowed, exam_type, question_type, is_platform_question, ai_generated, source, source_metadata, created_at, updated_at)
VALUES ('929e7b97-2129-4599-bfaf-388e4e610cea', 'Which statement is best supported by the poll?', 'A poll of 1,000 voters reports 51% support for a measure, with a margin of error of ±6 percentage points at a 95% confidence level.', NULL, '[{"id":"A","text":"Support could plausibly be as low as 45% or as high as 57%","is_correct":true,"explanation":"The interval is 45% to 57%."},{"id":"B","text":"Exactly 51% of all voters in the country support the measure","is_correct":false,"explanation":"A sample estimate is not an exact population value."},{"id":"C","text":"The poll proves every voter was surveyed","is_correct":false,"explanation":"Only 1,000 voters were polled."},{"id":"D","text":"Margin of error means the poll is meaningless","is_correct":false,"explanation":"Margin of error quantifies uncertainty; it does not invalidate the poll."}]'::jsonb, 'A', 'With ±6 points, plausible support ranges from 45% to 57%.', NULL, 'Problem-Solving and Data Analysis', 'Inference from sample statistics', 'math', 'psda', 'IEE', 'IEE', 'easy', true, 'SAT', 'multiple_choice', true, true, 'scholaris_ai', '{"generator":"scholaris_bulk_v1","original":true,"explanation_v2":true}'::jsonb, now(), now())
ON CONFLICT (id) DO NOTHING;
INSERT INTO public.questions
(id, question_text, stimulus_text, stimulus_type, options, correct_answer, explanation, hint, topic, subtopic, section, domain_id, skill_id, math_skill_code, difficulty, calculator_allowed, exam_type, question_type, is_platform_question, ai_generated, source, source_metadata, created_at, updated_at)
VALUES ('5868a85e-7309-4b5a-a289-a7d4beb5b91f', 'Which statement is best supported by the poll?', 'A poll of 1,000 voters reports 44% support for a measure, with a margin of error of ±3 percentage points at a 95% confidence level.', NULL, '[{"id":"A","text":"Support could plausibly be as low as 41% or as high as 47%","is_correct":true,"explanation":"The interval is 41% to 47%."},{"id":"B","text":"Exactly 44% of all voters in the country support the measure","is_correct":false,"explanation":"A sample estimate is not an exact population value."},{"id":"C","text":"The poll proves every voter was surveyed","is_correct":false,"explanation":"Only 1,000 voters were polled."},{"id":"D","text":"Margin of error means the poll is meaningless","is_correct":false,"explanation":"Margin of error quantifies uncertainty; it does not invalidate the poll."}]'::jsonb, 'A', 'With ±3 points, plausible support ranges from 41% to 47%.', NULL, 'Problem-Solving and Data Analysis', 'Inference from sample statistics', 'math', 'psda', 'IEE', 'IEE', 'hard', true, 'SAT', 'multiple_choice', true, true, 'scholaris_ai', '{"generator":"scholaris_bulk_v1","original":true,"explanation_v2":true}'::jsonb, now(), now())
ON CONFLICT (id) DO NOTHING;
